overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The player traverses an elevated walkway toward a massive concrete structure, passes through a dark graffiti-covered tunnel, and emerges into a bright open plaza with reflective surfaces and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway approaching Brainporium structure

events.description: entering dark covered tunnel under the massive concrete structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway toward large concrete head structure

notable_agents.action: standing still on walkway near tunnel entrance wearing light-colored jacket

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete building shaped like a human head with geometric facial features
neon sign with pink and yellow letters spanning across the walkway overhead
tall skyscraper with glass facade and industrial scaffolding details
rounded building with vertical yellow stripes and metallic surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway toward a massive brutalist structure shaped like a human head. A neon 'Brainporium' sign spans overhead. The area is open to the clear sky with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance. A single NPC stands near the tunnel entrance ahead.

events.description: transition from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting inside tunnel
passing people sitting on concrete stairs to the right

agents.ego_description: moving through dark tunnel, descending stairs with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: sitting on stairs against the wall wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and street art tags
descending staircase with metal railings leading downward

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark, enclosed tunnel with graffiti-covered concrete walls. The lighting shifts to dim artificial fluorescent lights. The path descends via concrete stairs where a few people are sitting. The space is narrow and industrial with metal railings along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with reflective flooring and futuristic architecture

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into bright sunlit plaza with reflective ground
emerging from darkness into bright natural sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza passing various pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing red and black combat armor

entered.detail: wet or polished tile surface reflecting buildings and sky with mirror-like quality
massive modern building with vertical gold stripes and glass facade
green painted pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead
futuristic vendor booths and metal barricades in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a vast open plaza with highly reflective flooring that mirrors the surrounding futuristic architecture. Tall glass skyscrapers rise on both sides, and an elevated green walkway spans overhead. Several pedestrians walk through the area, and the player approaches a character in distinctive red armor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open-air brutalist walkway into a dark industrial tunnel before emerging into a luminous futuristic plaza. It begins by moving along an elevated concrete path toward a massive structure shaped like a human head, passing under a neon Brainporium sign with skyscrapers visible against a clear sky. As the camera reaches the tunnel entrance, the environment shifts abruptly into a dim, enclosed space characterized by graffiti-covered walls and flickering fluorescent lights. The path then descends via concrete stairs and narrow industrial walkways before finally opening up into a vast plaza. This final transition reveals a bright expanse of highly reflective flooring mirrored by towering glass skyscrapers and an elevated green walkway, leading the camera toward a character in red armor.
